t_ch: 虽说她不像外表那么柔弱，但还是……
t_en: Her strength belies her appearance, but even so...

t_ch: 你看着也很柔弱啊。嗨，赶紧去找她吧，史瓦罗还在门后等着咱们呢。
t_en: You don't look so tough yourself. Well, let's find her. Svarog's not going anywhere.

t_ch: 这么大的镇子，上哪去找那么个小姑娘呀？
t_en: This is a big town. Where should we start?

t_ch: 克拉拉不是说要来找什么机器元件吗？还是先去娜塔的储藏室看看吧。
t_en: Clara said she was going to find components, right? Let's start with Nat's storage room.

t_ch: 这不是跟着克拉拉的机器人吗？
t_en: Isn't this the robot that was following Clara around?

t_ch: …这些铁皮罐头不都一个模样吗，你怎么认出来的？
t_en: ...These can openers all look the same. How can you tell them apart?

t_ch: 嘘，它好像想说什么，听——
t_en: Shh, it's about to say something. Listen...

t_ch: 自我修复模组正在初始化…初始化失败……
t_en: Initializing self-repair module... Initialization failure...

t_ch: 克拉拉…受到威胁……
t_en: Clara... in danger...

t_ch: 必须…保护……
t_en: Must... protect...

t_ch: 受到威胁？什么意思？
t_en: In danger? What do you mean?

t_ch: 工坊…敌人…必须清除……
t_en: Workshop... target... must be eliminated...

t_ch: 它的意思是，工坊那里有怪物出现？克拉拉她……
t_en: Does it mean that a monster appeared over at the workshop? Clara, she...

t_ch: 坏了，她有危险！快，赶紧去工坊确认下情况，我认得路。
t_en: Not good. She's in danger! Quick. Let's head over to the workshop and check it out. I know the way.

t_ch: 果然，那边有个大家伙！克拉拉也在，得赶紧去救她！
t_en: Just as we feared, there's something big over there! And there's Clara — we have to save her!

t_ch: 上吧，这次我们人多势众，不用害怕。
t_en: Let's go. No need to fear. We have the numerical advantage.

t_ch: 你没事吧，克拉拉？受伤了没？
t_en: Are you okay, Clara? Are you hurt?

t_ch: 谢、谢谢大家，我没事，一点小擦伤而已。
t_en: Th—Thanks, everyone. I'm fine. Just a few scratches.

t_ch: 果然不该放你一个人乱跑，实在太危险了。话说回来，你在这里找什么啊？
t_en: You shouldn't be running around by yourself. It's too dangerous. What are you looking for here?

t_ch: 基地的供能装置出了故障，要是不快点把它修好的话，聚落里的大家就都要遭殃了。
t_en: There's a fault with one of the energy supply units at the base. If I don't repair it soon, everyone at the settlement will be affected.

t_ch: 我知道这座镇上有一家工坊，所以就想来找找看。需要的元件都找到了，但是却不小心撞上了怪物……
t_en: I knew there was a workshop in this town, so I wanted to try my luck here. I found all the components I need, but then I ran into a monster...

t_ch: 还好有大家出手相救，克拉拉会把这件事告诉史瓦罗先生的。
t_en: You guys saved me — I'll tell Mr. Svarog about it.

t_ch: 说到史瓦罗…
t_en: Speaking of Svarog...

t_ch: ——我们正打算去见他。
t_en: ...We were planning on paying him a visit.

t_ch: 我们正打算去见他。
t_en: We were just about to pay him a visit.

t_ch: …咦？大家是有什么要紧的事要找史瓦罗先生吗？克拉拉可以帮你们带话……
t_en: ...Huh? What do you need to see him for? I can pass him a message...

t_ch: 不行，这次我们得跟他当面聊清楚。你能带我们去见他吗？
t_en: No, this time we need to set things straight with him face to face. Can you take us to meet him?

t_ch: 可是…史瓦罗先生一向不喜欢和其他人沟通，尤其是「地火」的各位……
t_en: But... Mr. Svarog doesn't like talking to others, especially Wildfire...

t_ch: 这我当然知道。但他已经逃避谈话太多次了，这回我们坚持要见到他。
t_en: Don't I know it. But he's evaded communication with us for too long — this time we have to see him.

t_ch: …大家都是在为下层区的人们努力，但是史瓦罗先生不相信人类的情感，他只相信计算的结果。
t_en: Um... I know you're working hard for the people down here, but Mr. Svarog doesn't trust human emotions. He only trusts his calculation results.

t_ch: 所以，我不能带大家去见他…如果你们和史瓦罗先生起了冲突，肯定会有人受伤的。无辜的人们也可能被波及。
t_en: So, I can't take you to see him... If Mr. Svarog and you had a fight, someone would get hurt for sure. Maybe even bystanders...

t_ch: 你这孩子……
t_en: Listen kid, you—

t_ch: 克拉拉，你上次说过吧？史瓦罗的职责是守望下层区，存护这里的文明。如果我们抱着相同的愿望谋求合作，他为什么要拒绝呢？
t_en: Clara, you said it yourself before, right? Svarog's duty is to protect the Underworld and preserve the civilization here. We have the same wish. Why would he refuse to cooperate with us?

t_ch: 我了解史瓦罗先生，他是不会被人们的愿望触动的，他只遵从理性的判断。
t_en: I know Mr. Svarog. He isn't affected by other people's wishes. He only follows logical judgments.

t_ch: 这个世界，正在发生非常可怕的事情…在他看来，地上已经快要走到尽头了。
t_en: Terrible things are happening on this world... Mr. Svarog thinks that the Overworld will end soon.

t_ch: 根据史瓦罗先生的计算结果，只靠下层区人们的力量，不可能阻止灾难的降临。
t_en: According to his calculation results, the strength of the Underworlders won't be enough to prevent the disaster.

t_ch: 他的应对方案，是为了让下层的人们能远离灾难的源头，多生存一段时间……
t_en: His plan is to keep the Underworlders away from the source of the disaster, so they can survive for longer...

t_ch: …那不就是把我们关在笼子里么？可笑，横竖都是一死，早两天晚两天有什么区别？连尝试着挣扎一下都不行吗？
t_en: ...Isn't that just putting us in a cage? It's ridiculous — what difference does it make if our death gets postponed a couple of days? How is that better than putting up a fight?

t_ch: 就当还我们人情吧，克拉拉。
t_en: See it as returning the favor, Clara.

t_ch: 克拉拉一定会回报大家的！但是唯独这件事不行……
t_en: I'll definitely return the favor! But not like this...

t_ch: 我们必须见到他，不惜代价。
t_en: We have to see him, whatever the cost.

t_ch: 抱歉…这件事，克拉拉真的帮不上忙。
t_en: I'm sorry... I really can't help you with this.

t_ch: 要不再想想别的办法？
t_en: Why don't we think of another way?

t_ch: 克拉拉也一直在尝试说服史瓦罗先生，请大家再等等……
t_en: I'm always trying to convince Mr. Svarog. Please give me more time...

t_ch: 那个，如果大家不介意的话…克拉拉还有重要的事，就先回去了。
t_en: Um, if you don't mind... I still have important things to do. I'll go back now.

t_ch: 克拉拉——
t_en: Clara—

t_ch: 希儿，别说了。那孩子已经下定决心了，我能从她的眼神里看出来。
t_en: It's no use, Seele. She's made up her mind. I could tell from her expression.

t_ch: 我们得再想想办法……
t_en: We will have to think of another way...

t_ch: 那孩子可真不一般啊，年纪轻轻的，就这么…固执？不对，聪明？
t_en: That's no ordinary kid. So young and yet so... stubborn? No, intelligent?

t_ch: 她把事情看得透彻，而且有自己的坚持，这两点都跟三月截然不同。
t_en: She's incisive, and determined... in sharp contrast to you, March.

t_ch: …你非得加这最后一句嘛！
t_en: ...Did you really have to add that last part!?

t_ch: 看来，想和史瓦罗本人搭上话，还得先过克拉拉这一关。
t_en: It looks like we'll have to get past Clara if we want to speak to Svarog.

t_ch: 如果连她都说服不了…
t_en: If we can't even persuade Clara...

t_ch: …就更别想着说服那个大机器人啦。
t_en: ...Then good luck persuading that mass of metal.

t_ch: 还有其它办法吗？
t_en: Is there any other way?

t_ch: 绕过克拉拉和那道门，史瓦罗只会把我们识别为入侵者，更不会给我们好脸色。
t_en: If we circumvent Clara and the gate, Svarog will only identify us as intruders. He'll be even more likely to give us the cold shoulder.

t_ch: 机器人也有脸色呀？
t_en: Isn't a robot shoulder cold to begin with?

t_ch: 克拉拉反复提起史瓦罗的「计算结果」……
t_en: Clara mentioned Svarog's "calculation results" many times...

t_ch: 「只靠下层区的人们，不可能阻止灾难降临」——这是她的原话，依我之见，突破口就在此处。
t_en: The strength of the Underworlders won't be enough to prevent the disaster... Those were her exact words. For me, that's our starting point.

t_ch: 你的意思是…那个机器人的逻辑里有漏洞吗？
t_en: So... you think Svarog's logic has a hole in it?

t_ch: 不，他的推算很准确。「星核」带来的麻烦，靠「地火」现有的力量是不可能解决的。不过，他的计算落后于现状了，新的「变量」还未加入算式……
t_en: No, his calculation is correct. At its current strength, it is highly unlikely that Wildfire would be able to resolve the problems stemming from the Stellaron. However, that calculation didn't take the present situation into account. There's a new variable yet to be added to the equation...

t_ch: 我们就是新的「变量」。
t_en: We're the new variable.

t_ch: 得让他认识到我们的价值。
t_en: We need him to recognize our value.

t_ch: …没错。假如能让史瓦罗相信，我们的确能够颠覆「计算结果」，就有推进和谈的希望。
t_en: ...Precisely. If we can make Svarog believe in us, we can almost certainly overturn the result of his calculation, and we'll be one step closer to peace talks.

t_ch: 但是，要怎么证明呢…这回光拿照片出来怕是不够用了吧？
t_en: But, how we can get him to do that... Showing him some of our photos wouldn't cut it, right?

t_ch: 总会有办法的。现在，首先要说服克拉拉。
t_en: There's always a way. But first, we have to convince Clara.

t_ch: 她应是直接回机械聚落了吧？我们也跟上。
t_en: I assume she must be on her way back to the robot settlement. Let's catch up with her.

t_ch: 看那边！克拉拉乘升降机下去了。
t_en: Over there! Clara went down on the elevator.

t_ch: 她转过去了，快跟上！
t_en: She turned that way, quick!

t_ch: 咦…人呢？明明刚才还看到她往这边走了。
t_en: Huh? Where'd she go? We just saw her go this way.

t_ch: 没办法，往前找找看吧。
t_en: *sigh* We'll just have to head straight and keep looking.

t_ch: 嗯…怎么会……
t_en: Hmm... why won't it...

t_ch: 想不明白……
t_en: Argh... I can't figure it out...

t_ch: …大家，果然还是跟来了呀。
t_en: ...Oh, it's you. You came with me after all.

t_ch: 我们没办法轻言放弃。
t_en: We couldn't give up that easily.

t_ch: 你是地下唯一的希望。
t_en: You're the underground's only hope.

t_ch: 但是，就算这么说……
t_en: You keep saying that, but...

t_ch: 你在修理这台设备吗，克拉拉？是否遇到了瓶颈？
t_en: Are you repairing this installation, Clara? Hit a snag?

t_ch: 欸？大哥哥怎么知道？
t_en: Huh? How did you know?

t_ch: 这两处的线管部件，尺寸和磨损程度明显和设备本身有差别，应该是你刚刚替换掉的吧？
t_en: The dimensions and wear of these two roller components look very different from the rest of the unit. You must have only just replaced them.

t_ch: 虽然替换了受损的元件，但是设备却没有照常重启，你是否在为这件事苦恼？
t_en: You replaced the damaged components, but the unit isn't starting up as normal. That's what you're trying to figure out, right?

t_ch: …嗯，克拉拉修过很多东西，但还是第一次碰到这么复杂的装置。
t_en: ...Yeah. I've fixed a lot of things before, but I never had to repair one as complicated as this.

t_ch: 史瓦罗呢，他怎么不出来帮你？
t_en: Why isn't Svarog helping you?

t_ch: 我不想惊动史瓦罗先生，因为设备是被两个流浪者叔叔…不小心弄坏的。如果被史瓦罗先生知道了，他肯定会很生气……
t_en: I don't want to disturb him. This installation was... accidentally damaged by two of the vagrants. If Mr. Svarog finds out, they'll get in big trouble...

t_ch: 真的是「不小心」吗…
t_en: Was it really an accident...?

t_ch: 你也过于为别人着想了。
t_en: You give a lot of thought to others.

t_ch: …克拉拉，太过善良可是会被坏人利用的。
t_en: ...Y'know Clara, if you're too kind, people can take advantage of you.

t_ch: 我或许找到问题所在了。虽然替换了线管，但它的轴承错位阻塞了。
t_en: I think I found the source of the problem. You replaced the rollers, but the bearing is causing a jam — there's a misalignment.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，三月，来帮我一下，合力把这东西修好。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, March, give me a hand. We should be able to fix it between us.

t_ch: 又要修东西了？我现在可是轻车熟路啦！
t_en: More fixing? I'm getting good at this!

t_ch: 哥哥姐姐，真的能把供能装置修好吗？
t_en: Can we really fix this?

t_ch: 放心吧，绝对能搞定——对吧丹恒？
t_en: Relax, we got this. Right, Dan Heng?

t_ch: …别问了，赶快过来搭把手。
t_en: ...Less asking, more helping.

t_ch: 哇！真的亮起来了，谢谢大家！
t_en: Whoa! It lit up! Thanks guys!

t_ch: 这下，聚落里的能源问题应该暂时解决了吧？
t_en: So, the settlement's energy supply problem is solved for the time being?

t_ch: 嗯，这样的话，外圈的大家就不用担心失去光和热了。
t_en: Yes. The people on the outskirts don't need to worry about heat or light now.
Umm...

t_ch: 我们不是要刻意讨好你。
t_en: We're not trying to win you over.

t_ch: 克拉拉明白。你们帮助了很多矿区的伤员，而且还冒着风险去镇上找物资，大家都是热心的好人。
t_en: I understand. You helped a lot of injured people in the mine, and you risked going into the town for supplies. You're good people.

t_ch: 我们再聊聊史瓦罗的事吧。
t_en: On the issue of Svarog...

t_ch: 我知道大家是热心的好人。在矿区里，你们帮助了很多伤员，还冒着风险去镇上找物资……
t_en: I know that you're good people. You helped a lot of the injured in the mine, and you risked going into the town for supplies.

t_ch: 如果有其他需要帮忙的地方，克拉拉一定会努力的！唯独这件事……
t_en: If there's any other way I can help you, I'll do my best! But this...

t_ch: 唔，究竟该怎么说服她……
t_en: *sigh* How are we gonna convince her?

t_ch: 指出「现状」。
t_en: Remind her of the "present situation."

t_ch: 「现状」就是…我们来了！这个星球的灾祸有了解决的办法……
t_en: The present situation is... we're here! This planet isn't doomed after all...

t_ch: 指出「变量」。
t_en: Point out the "variable."

t_ch: 「变量」就是…我们的到来！十几年来首次有外人进入地下……
t_en: The variable is... our arrival! No outsider's set foot in the underground for over a decade...

t_ch: 你自由发挥吧。
t_en: Make something up.

t_ch: …你还真信任我啊，{NICKNAME}。
t_en: ...You might be putting a little too much faith in me, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 克拉拉，你很擅长观察的对吧？你看我们三个，像是下层区人嘛？
t_en: Clara, you're observant, right? Take a look at us. Do we look like Underworlders?

t_ch: 欸？只看外表的话，确实跟其他人完全不一样……
t_en: Well, uhh... you do look very different from other people.

t_ch: 那就对啦！我们并不是这个世界的人，在史瓦罗的运算里并没有我们的存在。如果他的计算基于「只靠下层区的人们」，那么得出来的结果已经不适用于现在了。
t_en: Right! That's because we're not from here. We've never been a factor in Svarog's calculations. And if those calculations are based solely on "the strength of the Underworlders," then the results don't apply to the present situation.

t_ch: 史瓦罗的计算是在什么时候开始的，克拉拉？
t_en: When did Svarog start doing his calculations, Clara?

t_ch: 是在…很久之前，听说是上下层区刚封闭的时候……
t_en: It was... a long time ago. The same time the Underworld was sealed off, I think...

t_ch: 现在的情况已经改变了，一位铁卫来到了地下，这件事在史瓦罗的计算中吗？更何况我们——
t_en: Circumstances have changed since then — there's a Silvermane Guard down here now! Is that part of Svarog's calculation? Not to mention, we're—

t_ch: 是从别的星球来的！
t_en: Not even from this planet!

t_ch: 是计算之外的存在！
t_en: Completely separate variables!

t_ch: 就直接告诉她吧！我们是从别的星球来的！
t_en: ...Just tell her already! We come from a different planet!

t_ch: 多了三个人！
t_en: Three people more than when we started!

t_ch: 那是重点吗？重点是我们是从别的星球来的！
t_en: That's your big reveal? The important part is: We're from a different planet!

t_ch: 史瓦罗大佬的算法，根本不可能把我们这几个变量囊括进去吧？
t_en: There's just no way that Svarog's calculations would have included variables like us, y'know?

t_ch: 别的…星球？
t_en: Different planet...?

t_ch: 请、请不要把克拉拉当小孩子！那些故事都是大人们想象出来的，克拉拉知道……
t_en: D—Don't treat me like a child! Those are just made-up stories that grown-ups like to tell. I don't...

t_ch: 不是想象。
t_en: They're not made-up.

t_ch: 人们在别的世界征服了天空。
t_en: In other worlds, people have already conquered the heavens.

t_ch: 你就是小孩子啊…
t_en: But you ARE a child...

t_ch: {NICKNAME}和三月没有撒谎，克拉拉。我相信{F#她们}{M#他们}。
t_en: Hey. {NICKNAME} and March aren't lying, Clara. I believe them.

t_ch: 布洛妮娅姐姐也……
t_en: Bronya, do you really...

t_ch: 我理解你的心情，克拉拉。你也希望下层区的情况能有转机，但同时又不想让任何人受到伤害，对吗？
t_en: I know how you feel, Clara. You want new hope for the underground, but you don't want anyone to get hurt in the process, right?

t_ch: 我的脑海里也存有疑问，但是直觉告诉我，三月，丹恒，还有{NICKNAME}…他们三个就是这个世界的转机。
t_en: I also have doubts... But my gut tells me that March, Dan Heng, and {NICKNAME}... They are the new hope this world has been waiting for.

t_ch: 让他们和史瓦罗见上一面吧，看看计算结果会不会有什么不同。于你、于他而言，这么做都没有什么损失，不是吗？
t_en: Let them meet Svarog, and let's see if his calculation result is any different. For you, for him... there's no harm in trying, right?

t_ch: 你见识过我们的能力了。
t_en: You've already seen our ability.

t_ch: 我们会改变这个世界的。
t_en: We will bring change to this world.

t_ch: 哎哟，试试也没损失嘛。
t_en: Come onnnn, what have we got to lose?

t_ch: 我…知道了。我会带大家去见史瓦罗先生。
t_en: I... Okay. I'll take you to see Mr. Svarog.

t_ch: 真的吗，太好了！
t_en: Really? Awesome!

t_ch: …嗯，克拉拉想明白了。
t_en: ...Mm. I understand now.

t_ch: 只靠克拉拉一个人的力量，想改变史瓦罗先生的想法要花上很久很久。就算等到克拉拉成为大人的时候，也不一定能有结果。
t_en: Trying to change Mr. Svarog's mind on my own would take forever. Even if I kept trying until I was all grown up, I don't think I could do it.

t_ch: 在等待的时间里，大家会生病，会失去家园，还会不断地发生争斗…就像之前在矿区里那样。
t_en: And all the while, people would be getting sick, losing their homes, and fighting... just like in the mine.

t_ch: 我不想让事情变成那样。如果大家有信心说服史瓦罗先生的话…克拉拉也要表现得勇敢一点。
t_en: I don't want that to happen. If you guys really believe that you can convince Mr. Svarog... then I need to be brave too.

t_ch: 大家，请跟我来吧。
t_en: Everyone, follow me.

t_ch: 帮助克拉拉修好了能源装置……
t_en: You help Clara repair the energy installation...

t_ch: 布洛妮娅！没想到刚才你会站出来挺我们，说得也太好了吧！
t_en: Bronya! I didn't know you'd stick up for us like that back there — well said!

t_ch: 哪有那么夸张，我只是…说了自己的真实想法而已。
t_en: It was nothing. I just... said what I truly felt.

t_ch: …我回来啦，提米。
t_en: ...I'm back, Timmy.

t_ch: 欢迎回来。克拉拉小姐。
t_en: Welcome back, Miss Clara.

t_ch: 提米，帮我开门吧，我想去见史瓦罗先生。
t_en: Timmy, open the gate please. I want to see Mr. Svarog.

t_ch: 检测到外来人员。是否放行？
t_en: Outsiders detected. Do you wish to permit access?

t_ch: 没关系的，他们都是克拉拉的客人。
t_en: It's okay. They're all my guests.

t_ch: 指令已收到。门禁终端已解锁。
t_en: Command received. Access restriction terminal unlocked.

t_ch: 欢迎回来。克拉拉小姐和客人。
t_en: Welcome back, Miss Clara and guests.

t_ch: 那个…如果可能的话，请大家不要激怒史瓦罗先生……
t_en: Uhh... If you can, please try not to upset Mr. Svarog...

t_ch: 放心吧，克拉拉！我们是来和他讲道理的。
t_en: It's okay, Clara! We're here to reason with him.

t_ch: 谈判的事就交给你们了，我可不擅长这个。
t_en: I'll leave negotiations to you guys. They're not my strong point.

t_ch: 和机器人谈判…对我来说也是第一次。
t_en: Negotiating with robots... I can't say I've tried it before.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，准备好了吗？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, are you ready?

t_ch: 走吧，我们去见史瓦罗。
t_en: Let's go and see Svarog.

t_ch: 再等等…
t_en: Hold on a moment...

t_ch: 我回来了，史瓦罗先生。
t_en: I'm back, Mr. Svarog.

t_ch: 我看到聚落的供能系统重新上线了。谢谢你，克拉拉。
t_en: I see that the energy supply system is back online. Thank you, Clara.

t_ch: 但是——你为什么要带他们来？
t_en: But... why have you brought them?

t_ch: 史瓦罗先生…有关前往上层区的事情，他们想和你谈谈。
t_en: Mr. Svarog... they want to talk to you about going to the surface.

t_ch: 正在分析…分析结果：目标不属于「地火」组织。背景：不明。分类：未知信息。
t_en: Analyzing... Analysis result: Target does not belong to Wildfire. Background: Unknown. Classification: Unknown.

t_ch: 鉴于克拉拉的引荐，我会给你们一个发言的机会。
t_en: You have arrived on Clara's recommendation. I will give you an opportunity to speak.

t_ch: 喂，他好像愿意跟我们沟通了欸！快，{NICKNAME}，该你的三寸不烂之舌出场啦！
t_en: Hey, sounds like he's willing to communicate! Quick, {NICKNAME}, time to smooth-talk him!

t_ch: 我们无意挑起争端。
t_en: We're not interested in stoking conflict.

t_ch: 寻求和平，了解。但那是你们单方面的表态。
t_en: You seek peace, understood. Nevertheless, your statement is unilateral.

t_ch: 至于我的态度，要在评估和你们的交涉结果后确定。
t_en: My position will be determined after assessing the result of our negotiation.

t_ch: 我们为地下的未来而来。
t_en: We're here about the future of the underground.

t_ch: 毫无价值的说辞。你们并非来自地下，无权代表下层区的人类。
t_en: An inadequate pretext. You are not from the underground. You have no right to represent Underworld humanity.

t_ch: 生存还是毁灭？这是一个问题！
t_en: To be, or not to be, that is the question!

t_ch: 疑问缺乏必要的情境，无法作答。
t_en: Said question lacks the necessary context to be answered.

t_ch: 直入主题吧，不要浪费这个世界宝贵的时间。
t_en: Proceed with your central point. Do not waste this world's valuable time.

t_ch: 把你的发言全挡回来了啊，这家伙……
t_en: He cut you off completely! This guy...

t_ch: 别自乱阵脚。记住，要让他相信我们是计算中的「变量」。
t_en: Stay focused. Remember, we have to make him see that we're a variable in the calculation.

t_ch: 我们是为「星核」而来的。
t_en: We're here about the Stellaron.

t_ch: 你知道「星核」是什么吗？
t_en: Do you know what a Stellaron is?

t_ch: 我、我们是「变量」！
t_en: W—We're a variable!

t_ch: 你想好了再说话！
t_en: Think before opening your mouth!
Stellaron...

t_ch: 调用数据库中…访问受阻。与未经授权的目标谈论「星核」：禁止。
t_en: Searching database... Access denied. Discussing "Stellaron" with unauthorized targets: Prohibited.

t_ch: 你们在触碰被封于世界深处的秘密。没有人类应当知道的秘密。
t_en: You are broaching a secret that lies at the heart of this world. A secret that should remain unknown to humanity.

t_ch: 重新评估目标状态——威胁指数上升。我要求你们告知真实的来意！
t_en: Reassessing targets... Threat index raised. I demand that you reveal your true intention.

t_ch: 果然，他知道「星核」…但这个话题有风险……
t_en: As expected... He knows of the Stellaron, but it's a restricted topic...

t_ch: 到了这个份上，还遮遮掩掩什么啊！{NICKNAME}，和他摊牌吧！成败都在此一举了。
t_en: We've come this far. Out with it already! {NICKNAME}, just be straight with him! Everything depends on it.

t_ch: 我们必须找到星核，然后…
t_en: We must find the Stellaron, and then...

t_ch: 我们要终结这个世界的灾难。
t_en: We want to bring this world's disasters to a close.

t_ch: 有记载的历史中，人类曾数次尝试与「星核」接触。无一例外，他们出于人类的私欲，企图将该物质占为己用。
t_en: Historical records state that humanity has already made multiple efforts to engage with the Stellaron. Without exception, these efforts have been motivated by human greed — attempts to secure the article for a selfish end.

t_ch: 筑城者的指令：任何尝试与「星核」接触的行为都将造成严重后果。重新评估中——目标威胁指数达到最高。
t_en: As instructed by the Architects: Any attempt to engage with the Stellaron will result in grave consequences. Reassessing... Target threat index critical.

t_ch: 怎么办怎么办？这情况看着不太妙啊！
t_en: What should we do? This is going from bad to worse!

t_ch: 等等，我们和那些人不一样！
t_en: Wait, we're not like those others!

t_ch: 没有证据表明你们会是「例外」。维持原有的计算结果。
t_en: There is no evidence to suggest you are an exception. Calculation result remains unchanged.

t_ch: 你的计算能力也不过如此了。
t_en: Your powers of calculation suck.

t_ch: 目标展现出的敌意大幅超出基准值。维持原有的计算结果。
t_en: Target hostility significantly exceeds base index. Calculation result remains unchanged.

t_ch: 和平维系协议暂时中止…申请启动剿灭协议。
t_en: Peacekeeping protocol temporarily disengaged... Requesting extermination protocol launch.

t_ch: 剿、剿灭？是字面上的意思吗？
t_en: E—Extermination? In the literal sense?

t_ch: 和谈破裂——三月，准备应战！
t_en: Peace talks are over — March, prepare for combat!

t_ch: 史瓦罗先生！请不要——
t_en: Mr. Svarog! Please, don't—

t_ch: 克拉拉！离开这里。
t_en: Leave, Clara!

t_ch: 克拉拉，危险！快找地方躲起来！
t_en: Clara, it's dangerous here! Find somewhere to hide!

t_ch: 嘁…最后还是得动手啊。
t_en: Tsk... looks like we have to take action after all.

t_ch: 原型机3号——「监督机器」史瓦罗，剿灭协议申请状态：已通过。
t_en: Prototype number 3, monitoring automaton Svarog, extermination protocol launch: Successful.

t_ch: …允许歼灭！
t_en: ...Annihilation permitted!

t_ch: 哎呀——没有医生在场的话，怎么能放心战斗呢。
t_en: Hah, how can you put up your best fight without a doctor on the battlefield?

t_ch: 大家，请专心战斗吧。我就在你们身后。
t_en: All of you, stay focused. I'm right behind you.

t_ch: 娜塔？你们怎么……
t_en: Nat? How did you...

t_ch: 「话不投机半句多」说的就是这种情况吧？多亏桑博我早有准备！
t_en: Guess you guys had a bad talk, huh? Luckily, Sampo's got your back!

t_ch: 桑博！果然是你这家伙——
t_en: Sampo! I knew you'd be involved somehow...

t_ch: 发现大量「地火」武装成员渗透，评估状态……
t_en: Base breached. Armed Wildfire personnel detected. Assessing...

t_ch: 所有高危个体，全部歼灭！
t_en: All subjects are high-risk individuals. Commencing complete annihilation!

t_ch: 糟糕，他居然有帮手！
t_en: Darn it! He's got extra hands!

t_ch: 呃…还真是只「手」啊……
t_en: So it's literally a helping hand?

t_ch: 那只大手…好像要爆炸了！
t_en: That hand of his! It's gonna explode!

t_ch: 集中精力防御——或者集火把它干掉。
t_en: Defense or offense, we need to pick one and go all in.

t_ch: 趁现在，最后一击！
t_en: Now! One last assault!

t_ch: 请、请等一下！
t_en: Wait! Wait!

t_ch: 请不要…伤害史瓦罗先生！
t_en: Please don't hurt Mr. Svarog!

t_ch: 克拉拉？你……
t_en: C—Clara? ...You...

t_ch: 史瓦罗先生已经没法战斗了，请你们…请你们不要伤害他！
t_en: Mr. Svarog can't fight anymore! Please... Please don't hurt him!

t_ch: 克…拉拉……
t_en: Cla...ra...

t_ch: 史瓦罗先生…请不要再逞强了，能把你了解的事情告诉大家吗？
t_en: Mr. Svarog... Don't push yourself any further. Can you tell them what you know?

t_ch: 史瓦罗先生说过，你愿意为我实现每个愿望，对吗？克拉拉现在最大的愿望，就是希望大家都能团结起来，像…像家人那样。
t_en: Mr. Svarog, you said you were willing to make all my wishes come true, right? My biggest wish right now is for everyone to work together. Like... like family.

t_ch: 过去这段时间，克拉拉学到了一件事——「计算」得到的结果，并不一定能带给大家幸福。
t_en: Recently, I learned something new... Calculation results can't always bring people happiness.

t_ch: 就算知道笼子外面的世界并没有多美好…人们也还是想把头探出去看看。
t_en: Even if the world outside the cage isn't beautiful... people still want to know what it's like.

t_ch: 评估系统重启中…重启成功。正在转化变量…
t_en: Assessment system reset... successful. Processing variables...

t_ch: 变量一：克拉拉的诉求…变量二：外来者的动机。
t_en: Variable 1: Clara's request... Variable 2: Outsiders' intentions.

t_ch: …评估结果更新：将决定权移交外来者，并允许访问「星核」相关的信息。
t_en: ...Updated assessment result: Transference of decision-making authority to outsiders. Outsiders are granted access to Stellaron intelligence.

t_ch: 这样…这样就算成功了吗？
t_en: So... So we did it?

t_ch: 付出的代价太大了。
t_en: The cost was too great.

t_ch: 幸好有克拉拉在，史瓦罗的冰冷逻辑似乎只会对她网开一面。
t_en: Clara seems like the only one who can break through Svarog's cold logic. It's a good thing she was here.

t_ch: 多亏了有克拉拉…
t_en: Thanks to Clara...

t_ch: 可不是嘛！要不然就算打倒了史瓦罗，他也不会让我们接触那些信息的吧？
t_en: Yeah! Without her, even if we'd defeated Svarog, there's no way he'd have given us access to the intel, right?

t_ch: 我们的实力得到认可了。
t_en: Our strength has been recognized.

t_ch: 就算是这样，如果没有克拉拉的话…史瓦罗死也不会让我们接触那些信息的吧？
t_en: Although, if Clara hadn't been here... Svarog would never have granted us access to the intel, right? Even up until the end.

t_ch: 希望他的记忆库里确实藏着和「星核」有关的数据。
t_en: I hope his memory bank really does contain data on the Stellaron.

t_ch: 这就结束了吗，娜塔？我们，「地火」，还有下层区…我们胜利了吗？
t_en: Is this it, Nat? Us, Wildfire, the Underworld... Did... did we win?

t_ch: 不对，希儿。
t_en: No, Seele.

t_ch: 我们，还有他们的战斗…都才刚开始而已。
t_en: Our battle... their battle... it's just beginning.

t_ch: 终于…终于到这个时候了。
t_en: Finally... We finally made it to this point.

t_ch: 怎么，你紧张了？
t_en: ...What's up, nervous?

t_ch: 与其说是紧张，不如说是…胸口有什么东西，在剧烈作痛。
t_en: No, but... I do have an aching feeling in my chest.

t_ch: 真相总是让人心痛。
t_en: The truth can be heartbreaking.

t_ch: 究竟谁在说谎，该你判断了。
t_en: It's up to you to make your own judgment about who's lying now.

t_ch: …我准备好了，{NICKNAME}。去揭开真相吧，我会在旁边听着。
t_en: ...I'm ready, {NICKNAME}. Reveal the truth. I'm listening.

t_ch: 与「星核」相关的数据和录音记录已经整理完毕。是否立即调用，外来者？
t_en: I have finished collating the Stellaron data and records. Do you wish to proceed, outsiders?

t_ch: 我想接收资料。
t_en: Let's have it.

t_ch: 申请调用数据库资料，编号<unbreak>13175</unbreak>。加密级别：最高。
t_en: Requesting database materials cache. Serial number, <unbreak>13175</unbreak>. Encryption level: Highest.

t_ch: 资料调用已批准，现在播放……
t_en: Request approved. Transmission...

t_ch: …多年研究的结果就摆在你的眼前，守护者大人。证据已经确凿了，那个所谓的「星核」就是一切灾难的根源。
t_en: ...This is the fruit of many years of research, Madam Guardian. The evidence is irrefutable: This so-called "Stellaron" is the source of all the destruction.

t_ch: 民众很难接受这样的结果，博士。如果让他们知道，是伟大的阿丽萨•兰德启动了这个东西，让这个世界被寒潮覆盖……
t_en: The people will struggle to accept this conclusion, doctor. If we were to tell them that the almighty Alisa Rand activated this thing and triggered the Eternal Freeze...

t_ch: 真相，大人——真相不会随大多数人的想法改变。你面前的研究报告，是贝洛伯格最优秀的学者们的汗水结晶，你必须相信它的权威性……
t_en: It's the truth, madam... The truth won't change with the opinions of the people. The reports before you are the precious result of painstaking effort on the part of Belobog's greatest scholars. You must trust the weight of its conclusion...

t_ch: …我从来没有质疑过你，博士。相反，我对你们得出的成果深信不疑。
t_en: ...I have never doubted you, doctor. On the contrary, I am resolute in the face of this conclusion.

t_ch: 从我登上这个位置的那一刻起，那个声音…他们的声音就寄宿在我的脑海里，挥之不去。
t_en: From the moment I took up this mantle, that voice... their voice — has made its home in my mind. I cannot shake them.

t_ch: ——我不该跟你说起这个，还是说回你们的研究吧。我不可能将这些研究报告公之于众，博士。除非……
t_en: ...I shouldn't be telling you this — let's return to your research, doctor. I'm afraid I cannot make these reports known to the public. Unless...

t_ch: 除非？除非什么？大人，我在听……
t_en: Unless? Unless what? Please proceed, madam...

t_ch: …除非你们能找到彻底摧毁「星核」的方法。
t_en: ...Unless you have found a way to completely destroy the Stellaron.

t_ch: 我明白了。以「存护」的名义…我一定不辱使命。
t_en: I understand. In the name of Preservation... I will fulfill this mission.

t_ch: <unbreak>13175</unbreak>号资料播放完毕。接下来播放：资料编号<unbreak>24830</unbreak>。
t_en: Cache number <unbreak>13175</unbreak>, transmission complete. Next transmission: Cache number <unbreak>24830</unbreak>.

t_ch: …我不明白，博士，为什么要把那些宝贵的研究成果藏起来？那些可是你毕生的心血……
t_en: ...I don't understand, doctor. Why do we have to hide such valuable research results away? They're the work of a lifetime...

t_ch: 咳、咳…你还年轻，孩子。总有一天…咳，总有一天，你会懂的。
t_en: *coughing* Y—You're still young, child. There will come a day... a day when you do understand.

t_ch: 大守护者…她比你我都想得更深远。所有决定都是为了贝洛伯格的安宁……
t_en: The Supreme Guardian... sh—she sees further than you or I. All her decisions are for the security of Belobog...

t_ch: 我只是觉得…遗憾。我们的研究陷入了瓶颈，您的成果又只能被雪藏……
t_en: I just think... it's a shame. Our research has hit an obstacle. Meanwhile, your results will be buried in the snow...

t_ch: 咳…不必遗憾，孩子，你还有很多时间。等你们找到摧毁——咳，摧毁「星核」的办法…我们的努力都不会白费。
t_en: *coughing* Don't be upset, child. You still have lots of time ahead of you. When you find a way to destroy — *coughing* — destroy the Stellaron... our efforts will have been worth it.

t_ch: <unbreak>24830</unbreak>号资料播放完毕。接下来播放：资料编号<unbreak>57614</unbreak>。
t_en: Cache number <unbreak>24830</unbreak>, transmission complete. Next transmission: Cache number <unbreak>57614</unbreak>.

t_ch: …这是…这里为什么还有个机器人？
t_en: ...This is... Why is there a robot here?

t_ch: 这是米尔斯海默博士生前的贴身机器卫士，据说是从大战期间一直留存下来的原型机。
t_en: During his life, this was Dr. Mearsheimer's personal robot bodyguard. I heard it's a prototype from the great war.

t_ch: 自从博士跟他的助手去世以后，它就一直停留在这里，一步都没动过。
t_en: Since the doctor and his assistants passed away, it's remained here. It hasn't moved an inch.

t_ch: 哦…原来如此。开始搜吧，一定要把博士的研究成果全都找到。
t_en: Oh... I see. Let's start. We must unearth the doctor's research conclusions — all of them.

t_ch: 找到了，守护者大人——所有文献都在这里了。
t_en: Madam Guardian, I've found them... All the documents are here.

t_ch: 嗯…很好，就这样吧。
t_en: Mm... good. That'll do.

t_ch: 守护者大人，这个大家伙——我们拿他怎么办？
t_en: Madam Guardian, what should we do with the robot?

t_ch: 啊…销毁的话未免过于浪费了。找人重置一下它的系统，然后把它安置到下层去吧。我听说开拓团正缺有自卫功能的机器人。
t_en: Ah... It would seem a great waste to destroy it. Find someone to reset its system and then arrange for it to be sent to the Underworld. I hear that the development group is in need of a robot with defense capabilities.

t_ch: 是，大人。
t_en: Yes, madam.

t_ch: 抱歉，博士…但这些成果必须由「筑城者」亲自管理。
t_en: I'm sorry, doctor... but these results must be taken care of by the Architects.

t_ch: 有朝一日，一定有人能完成你们的遗愿。
t_en: One day, somebody will be able to carry out your behest.

t_ch: <unbreak>57614</unbreak>号资料播放完毕。数据展示结束。
t_en: Cache number <unbreak>57614</unbreak>, transmission complete. Concluding data transmission.

t_ch: …这下就真相大白了吧？
t_en: ...So the truth is clear now, right?

t_ch: 他们在找摧毁星核的办法…
t_en: They were looking for a way to destroy the Stellaron...

t_ch: 而且从现如今的情况推断…他们直到最后也没能成功。
t_en: And it would appear that they never succeeded.

t_ch: 没太听懂，谁能帮我捋一遍？
t_en: I didn't quite understand. Can someone go over it again?

t_ch: 忽略掉那些碎片化的细枝末节…结论就是，这个世界的高层人员，还有守护者本人——他们其实早就知道「星核」就是灾难的源头。
t_en: Putting minor details aside, this is the conclusion... Eminent individuals, not to mention the guardian herself, knew early on that the Stellaron was the source of disaster on this world.

t_ch: 但为了城市的安定，他们选择隐藏真相。而试图摧毁星核的秘密研究也以失败告终。
t_en: But in order to maintain the peace, they decided to hide the truth. Secret research detailing a method for destroying a Stellaron ended in failure.

t_ch: 现在只剩下最后一个问题——那个可可利亚为什么会突然性情大变。
t_en: Now only one question remains... Why would Cocolia exhibit such a sudden change in her attitude towards us?

t_ch: 布洛妮娅？你还好吗？
t_en: Bronya? Are you okay?

t_ch: …我没事，我只是…感觉有些头晕 。
t_en: ...I'm fine. I just... feel a little faint.

t_ch: 对你来说信息量过大了。
t_en: This must be a lot to take in for you.

t_ch: 现在你可以相信我们了。
t_en: You can believe us now.

t_ch: 母亲大人，为什么…也许她不知情，也许她……
t_en: Why...? Why, mother...? M—Maybe she wasn't aware, maybe she...

t_ch: …别再骗自己了，布洛妮娅。该到你下定决心的时候了。
t_en: ...I'm sorry. It's no use lying to yourself, Bronya. It's time for you to make a decision.

t_ch: …{NICKNAME}，能来跟我聊聊吗？我知道，大家都需要时间来消化这些信息，但我们还是得尽早决定下一步的计划。
t_en: ...{NICKNAME}, can I have a word with you? I know that we'll need time to process this new information, but we have to decide on our next plan as soon as possible.

t_ch: 「炉心」…通往地上的道路，现在近在咫尺。
t_en: The Furnace Core... The path to the surface is close at hand now.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，谢谢你们，是你们的努力让下层区重新看到了希望。现在…现在我们只能祈祷，但愿这丝希望能通向一线生机。
t_en: Thank you, {NICKNAME}. What you've done has brought new hope to the Underworld. Now we have to wait and see... But maybe this will lead to a new lease on life.

t_ch: 你们的支援很及时，多谢。
t_en: Your support came at the right moment. Thank you.

t_ch: 这次你真得感谢桑博了，多亏了他的情报，我们才能在关键时刻赶到。
t_en: Well, you should really be thanking Sampo. If it weren't for his intel, we wouldn't have made it in time.

t_ch: 医生怎么会亲自上战场？
t_en: When did doctors start carrying weapons around?

t_ch: 很抱歉，之前一直瞒着你们……
t_en: ...I, um... I haven't been truthful with you...

t_ch: 我作为「地火」的首领，当然不能眼睁睁地看着你们为了下层区奋战，自己却在一边见死不救。
t_en: As Wildfire's leader, I couldn't simply look on while you fought on our behalf. We had to come help.

t_ch: 咦…咦！？所以，娜塔莎医生才是「地火」的首领？那、那位奥列格大叔他……
t_en: Huh...? Huh!? So, you're the real chief? Wh—What about Oleg?

t_ch: 奥列格，他一直以来都在做我的「代理」，帮我处理下层区明面上的各种事务。
t_en: Oleg has always acted on my behalf — he helps me deal with all manner of problems in the Underworld.

t_ch: 多亏了他的勤勉，我才能挤出时间来打理下层区的民生，尽可能地让大家不在街头挨饿…另一方面，我也一直在筹备反抗史瓦罗的计划。
t_en: Thanks to him, I'm able to make time for the people. I do my best to make sure that they have everything they need... At the same time, I was formulating a plan to deal with Svarog.

t_ch: 你们的出现，推翻了我绸缪许久的计划雏形——为此，我更该对各位表示感谢。
t_en: Your arrival unraveled that carefully crafted yet rudimentary plan, hehe... and for that, you have my utmost thanks.

t_ch: 不用谢，这都是英雄该做的。
t_en: You're welcome, all in a day's work for a hero.

t_ch: 当下层区重获自由时，人们会像称颂英雄一样称颂你们。
t_en: When the Underworld recovers its freedom, the people will indeed extol you as heroes.

t_ch: 我们是为了自己，没那么无私。
t_en: We did it for us, it wasn't as selfless as you made out.

t_ch: 「论迹不论心」，是有这么句话来着？如果下层区能重获自由，人们自然会把你们视作英雄。
t_en: A person is defined by their actions alone... I think that's how the saying goes? If the Underworld recovers its freedom, the people will see you as heroes.

t_ch: 除了谢谢，就没点实际的么？
t_en: Any chance of a more... tangible show of thanks?

t_ch: 你们会得到「地火」的全力支持。
t_en: You have Wildfire's full support.

t_ch: 但现在，虽然史瓦罗不再封锁炉心，地下的人还是不能贸然涌入上层区。
t_en: However, even though Svarog is no longer sealing off the Furnace Core, there's no way that we undergrounders could go pouring onto the surface.

t_ch: 那个冷血的大守护者用谎言和手腕将上下层隔开，如果被她发觉了地下的变化，不知会做出什么事来……
t_en: That cold-blooded supreme guardian has used lies and tricks to keep the surface separated from the underground. If she detects any change in the Underworld, I don't know what she might resort to...

t_ch: 对于「地火」来说，我们还需要更多时间养精蓄锐。
t_en: As for Wildfire, we need more time to build up our strength.

t_ch: 事到如今，你们要抽身事外？
t_en: With things as they are, you want to take a back seat?

t_ch: 不，我会让我最信赖的人做你们的帮手，和你们同去，静待时机成熟。
t_en: No, but we need to wait for the opportune moment. In the meantime, I'm sending someone I trust to go with you.

t_ch: 只靠我们很难对付守护者。
t_en: It will be difficult for us to defeat the guardian alone.

t_ch: 当然，这点你我都心知肚明。所以，我想让我最信赖的人和你们同去。
t_en: Of course, there's no doubt about that. So, I'll be sending someone I trust to go with you.

t_ch: 希儿……
t_en: Seele...

t_ch: 在你们面前可能没表现出来吧？私下里，她已经向我展现了强烈的愿望。
t_en: Didn't she tell you? In private, she insisted on accompanying you.

t_ch: 别看希儿平时大大咧咧的，她心里其实有一面镜子，所有的是非利害她都再清楚不过。
t_en: Don't let her carefree nature fool you — she's actually very discerning, and can read a situation like no one else.

t_ch: 希儿擅长侦察，而且思维敏捷、行动果断，她肯定能帮上你们的忙。况且…你们现在还有布洛妮娅。
t_en: Seele is a talented scout and a quick thinker — she takes decisive action. She'll definitely be able to help you. Not to mention... you also have Bronya now.

t_ch: 她会站在我们这边吗…
t_en: Will she stand with us...?

t_ch: 从史瓦罗那儿得到的信息似乎对她造成了很大的冲击…但有希儿在她身边，她一定能缓过来的。
t_en: It seems like the intel we got from Svarog caused her a significant shock... but with Seele by her side, I know she'll recover.

t_ch: 她受到了很大的冲击。
t_en: She got a big shock.

t_ch: 你说的没错，但有希儿在她身边，她一定能缓过来的。
t_en: You're right, but with Seele by her side, I know she'll recover.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，你很久没有休息过了吧？我听说了，从铆钉镇回来以后，你们就一直在为了见到史瓦罗东奔西跑，一刻都没闲着。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, when's the last time you got some rest? I heard that you've been on your feet looking for Svarog since Rivet Town.

t_ch: 身体才是革命的本钱，就这么垮了可不行。史瓦罗和「炉心」就先交给「地火」吧，你们该回去好好休息一番了。
t_en: Health is everything — you won't be much use if you neglect yours. Let Wildfire take care of the Furnace Core for now. You head back and recuperate.

t_ch: 如果运气站在我们这边的话…也许明天你们就能回到上层区了。
t_en: If you're lucky... perhaps tomorrow you can return to the Overworld.

t_ch: 听说了没？那些蠢货好像在矿区打起来了，还是靠史瓦罗大佬出面才摆平的。
t_en: Did you hear? Those idiots got into a fight in the mine, haha! It only got settled after Boss Svarog showed up.

t_ch: 我早说过这地下就只有史瓦罗大佬能罩着我们，跟着他混准没错。
t_en: I've said it before — only Boss Svarog can protect us down here. Everyone should follow his lead.

t_ch: 喂，你说呢？哑巴啦？
t_en: Well, what do you think? Cat got your tongue?

t_ch: …你三句不离史瓦罗大佬，我听腻了。
t_en: ...Do you ever talk about anything else? I'm so tired of hearing about Svarog.

t_ch: 没办法，这是事实啊，你看看我们周围这堆货色…没了史瓦罗大佬，全都得饿死。
t_en: B—But it's true. What else is there to say? Take a look at all these good-for-nothings... They'd starve to death without him.

t_ch: 补给站突然多了几箱医疗物资，谁弄来的？
t_en: Did you see those extra boxes of medical supplies at the depot? Who brought those over?

t_ch: 估计是克拉拉吧？我想不到还有谁会这么好心了。
t_en: Clara, I assume? I can't think of anyone else that'd do something that generous.

t_ch: 克拉拉是谁，也是流浪者吗？
t_en: Who's Clara? Is she one of us?

t_ch: 那孩子跟你我可不能相提并论啊，她是史瓦罗大佬信赖的家人。
t_en: Not even close! She's Svarog's trusted family.

t_ch: 机器人的…家人？
t_en: Family... of a robot?

t_ch: 嗐，等你再呆上一段时间就懂了……
t_en: Well, you'll understand when you've been here a while longer.

t_ch: 别乱动，我马上就把你修好。
t_en: Hold still. You're nearly fixed.

t_ch: 我是应该进机械墓场的旧款式。零件并不值钱。
t_en: My design has been superceded by newer models. My components are no longer valuable.

t_ch: 你、你在说啥呢？我才不会把你的零件拿去卖呢。
t_en: Hey! What are you talking about? I'm not interested in selling your components.

t_ch: 抓紧时间休息吧，{NICKNAME}，地上的冒险可不会这么轻松了。
t_en: Take a good rest while you still can, {NICKNAME}. Your adventures on the surface won't be easy-going.

t_ch: 你居然是「地火」的首领。
t_en: So you're the leader of Wildfire.

t_ch: 不用意外，说是首领，实际上不过是帮大家拿拿主意。
t_en: Don't be surprised. My job is just to help everyone make the right calls.

t_ch: 记得铆钉镇吗？裂界开始侵蚀那座小镇的时候，我们全都手无寸铁，毫无保卫家园的手段。
t_en: You remember Rivet Town? When the Fragmentum corrosion first appeared, we were defenseless. We didn't have a clue how to protect our homes.

t_ch: 逃到磐岩镇之后，我就下定了决心：同样的悲剧不能再次上演。所以我才召集了奥列格他们，创建了最初的「地火」。
t_en: After we fled to Boulder Town, I made up my mind: A tragedy like that could never be allowed to happen again. That's why I gathered Oleg and the others together, and created the first sparks of Wildfire.

t_ch: 再后来，「地火」的规模越来越大。老实说，我最早也没想到会有这么一天。
t_en: Afterwards, Wildfire began to grow. To be honest, I never thought a day like this would come.

t_ch: 温柔的医生姐姐只是演技吗！
t_en: Your "gentle doctor" act is pretty good!

t_ch: 你在说什么呢，那也是我啊，是我面对病人的那一面。
t_en: What do you mean? That's me too, y'know. The "me" that my patients see, at least.

t_ch: 身份就像是面具。人更换身份的时候，也会更换自己对外展示的形象。
t_en: Our identities are like masks. When we switch between them, we change the way the world perceives us.

t_ch: 但内心是不会变的哦。
t_en: But our hearts never change.

t_ch: 「地火」接下来有什么打算？
t_en: What's Wildfire's plan?

t_ch: 在局势完全稳定下来之前，我们不想贸然行动，要等待时机成熟。
t_en: Well, we don't want to act in haste before the situation has stabilized. We need to wait for the right time.

t_ch: 十多年的封锁下来，下层区已经元气大伤。既然「炉心」的封锁解除了，我们首先要补充急缺的资源，让大家先喘口气。
t_en: Ten years of being sealed away has sapped the Underworld's vitality. Now that the Furnace Core is no longer blocked off, we need to prioritize the people and replenish our resources.

t_ch: 「地火」从来不是什么野心组织，我们所做的一切都是为了下层区的民众。这条通路只是达成目的的手段，并不是目的本身。
t_en: Wildfire has never been in this for its own gain. Everything we do is for the citizens of the Underworld. That passage is a means to an end, not the end itself.

t_ch: 克拉拉和史瓦罗会怎么样？
t_en: What about Clara and Svarog?

t_ch: 我们不会对他们做什么…虽然史瓦罗堵死了炉心，但他一直给流浪者提供庇护，算是一件善举……
t_en: We'll leave them be... Svarog may have blocked off the Furnace Core, but he's provided shelter to the vagrants from the beginning. An admirable deed.

t_ch: 地下有许多无家可归的人需要照料，若不是缺乏安全感，他们也不会为了生存做出触犯底线的行为。
t_en: There are many homeless people in the Underworld. If they had safety and security, they wouldn't have to struggle to survive.

t_ch: 在史瓦罗恢复正常之前，照看这些人的工作就先由「地火」接管吧。
t_en: Wildfire can provide that while Svarog is recovering.

t_ch: 没有什么想问的了。
t_en: I don't have any more questions.

t_ch: 这里的事情总算告一段落了，你们也抓紧时间休整一下吧。
t_en: Things have settled for now, you should rest while you can.

t_ch: 「天亮时，守护者要如闪耀的恒星，照亮人民的道路」。
t_en: At daybreak, the guardian shall be a glittering star, illuminating the people's path.

t_ch: 「天黑时，守护者要如温暖的炉火，抚慰人民的心灵」。
t_en: At nightfall, the guardian shall be a flickering flame, comforting the people's soul.

t_ch: 这么多年了…我追随的，难道全都是谎言吗？
t_en: So many years... Have I been following lies this whole time?

t_ch: 你该找个人聊聊了。
t_en: Hey... maybe you should find someone to talk to...

t_ch: 别总露出丧气样子，你的心情又不是不能跟别人分享，自己闷着头烦恼有意思吗？
t_en: Don't let it get you down — you can share your feelings with others y'know? Do you think keeping it all to yourself is doing you any good?

t_ch: 把烦心事憋在心里，说到底还不是觉得自己身居高位，不想在别人面前示弱？
t_en: You let that status of yours go to your head, huh? Afraid to show weakness? That's why you're keeping so much bottled up inside, right?

t_ch: 这里不是上层，没那么多猜忌、规矩。不管有什么烦恼，都可以大声说出来。
t_en: This isn't the Overworld. We don't do envy and etiquette down here. Whatever's on your mind, you can say it.

t_ch: …我只是想先在心里梳理清楚。这些历史的碎片，我曾经学到的那些知识…现在全在我脑子里乱成了一团。我…我不知道自己该相信什么。
t_en: ...I just want to be clear in myself, first. These fragments of history, the teachings I studied... It's all muddled together in my mind... I just... I don't know what I should believe.

t_ch: …不，你应该很清楚自己该做什么。
t_en: ...No, you just have to be clear on what you should do.

t_ch: 你在谎言里活得够久了，布洛妮娅。现在就是冲破牢笼的机会。
t_en: You've spent long enough living in lies, Bronya. This is your chance to break out of the cage.

t_ch: 怎么样，伙计？在你胸中激荡的是胜利的快感，还是劫后余生的喜悦？
t_en: How's it going, partner? Is that feeling in your chest the thrill of victory or just the joy of making it out alive?

t_ch: 如果是对老桑博的感恩戴德之情…那就免了，咱们是什么交情？钱到位了就行！
t_en: I know, your heart is bursting with gratitude... but there's no need to thank me. We have what I'd like to call a "fiscal friendship." If the money's right, not a problem in sight!

t_ch: 你什么时候叫的人？
t_en: When did you call in for reinforcements?

t_ch: 嘿，我老早就猜到你们要惹祸上身，所以就提早去找奥列格搬救兵咯。明智吧？
t_en: Ha, I knew that you'd get yourselves into trouble eventually, so I got Oleg to send relief in advance. Pretty sensible, right?

t_ch: 我是问你干嘛瞒着我们？
t_en: I'm asking why you went behind our backs.

t_ch: 我当时的任务就是「带你们到史瓦罗的老巢」而已。钱货两讫，我想干啥也不用跟你说啊。
t_en: My assignment was simply to take you to Svarog's lair. I got the payment and delivered the goods — I wasn't obligated to tell you about my dinner plans!

t_ch: 我提供的可是额外服务哎。要不是咱们交情深，可是要加钱的。
t_en: But I threw in something extra regardless. I only did that because we're friends, or I would've charged extra.

t_ch: 干得好，救了我们一命。
t_en: Nice work, you saved us.

t_ch: 嗐，承蒙夸奖！朋友之间就是得互相照应，以后才好谈生意嘛。
t_en: My pleasure! Friends should look out for each other. Good for business.

t_ch: 再送一条人生经验：要干有风险的买卖，机智的商人都会有个备用计划——以及备用的备用计划。
t_en: Here's a slice of life experience for you: Resourceful businessmen never get into risky trading without a plan b... and a plan b for their plan b. Plan c, we call that.

t_ch: 你知道娜塔莎是地火的…
t_en: You knew Natasha belonged to Wildfire...

t_ch: …首领？当然知道，「地火」干的那些事儿，一群热血乡巴佬做得来么。
t_en: ...The chief? Of course I knew. Wildfire are mostly made up of torch and pitchfork types. How could they function without her?

t_ch: 不是说奥列格老头儿不好啊——他处理那些脏活累活很有一套，只是「地火」确实需要娜塔莎这么个心思缜密的幕后黑——咳，老大，嘿嘿。
t_en: Not that I'm criticizing old Oleg! He's good at the heavy lifting. It's just that Wildfire needs a meticulous thinker lurking in the sha— Ahem! ...Working in the background, hehe.

t_ch: 你好像热衷于搅乱局面。
t_en: You seem to enjoy muddying the waters.

t_ch: 哎唷，这可是天大的误会！我只是热衷「看别人打架」——毕竟人与人斗，其乐无穷嘛！
t_en: Hey now, you've got me all wrong! I just enjoy watching people fight, that's all. Fierce words, fists flying... what's not to like?

t_ch: 谢谢你，桑博。
t_en: Thank you, Sampo.

t_ch: 喂喂喂，别这么肉麻。我们干买卖的最讨厌谢谢两字了——都是生意，么得感情！
t_en: Easy there, don't get mushy on me now. We professional types don't have time for "thank yous." It's business! Feelings don't come into it.

t_ch: 开个玩笑～桑博永远乐意为你效劳。
t_en: Hahaha~ you see? Gotcha! Hah, seriously though — Sampo will always be happy to assist you.

t_ch: 史瓦罗先生，你还好吗？我先帮你修补一下语言模块吧……
t_en: Mr. Svarog, are you okay? Let me repair your language module first...

t_ch: 评估中…语言模块运作正常。谢谢你，克拉拉。
t_en: Assessing... Language module operating as normal. Thank you, Clara.

t_ch: 记忆模块有没有受损呢？克拉拉也想尽可能地帮忙。
t_en: Did your memory module get damaged? Maybe I can fix that too.

t_ch: 记忆模块检索开始……
t_en: Retrieving memory module...

t_ch: 筑城者机械时期的记录，完整；保卫战争期间的战斗数据，完整；地髓开拓团时期的记录，完整…
t_en: Architect machine era records: Intact. War of Defense combat data: Intact. Geomarrow Development Group era records: Intact...

t_ch: 克拉拉制造出迷你磁流钻机的记录，完整；克拉拉解释人类行为「睡懒觉」的记录，完整……
t_en: Record of Clara's crafting of miniature magnetic drill rigs: Intact. Record of Clara's explanation of human "sleeping in" behavior: Intact...

t_ch: 所、所以，记忆模块应该没问题了？
t_en: S—So, your memory module is okay?

t_ch: 与克拉拉相关的记录已经做好了备份，不必担心。
t_en: I have made a backup of all records pertaining to you, Clara. Do not worry.

t_ch: …有关「睡懒觉」的记录也？
t_en: ...Even the one about sleeping in?

t_ch: 已经进行了多重备份，可以随时提取。
t_en: There are multiple backups. I can recover them at any time.

t_ch: 史瓦罗先生，我能不能删掉一部分……
t_en: Mr. Svarog, can I delete some of them...?

t_ch: 不予执行。与克拉拉相关的记忆都是重要的数据，必须完整保存。
t_en: I cannot grant this request. Records pertaining to you constitute important data, Clara. They must remain intact.

t_ch: 对史瓦罗来说，这就是家人的回忆。
t_en: They are memories of family.

t_ch: …克拉拉明白了。
t_en: ...I understand.

t_ch: 史瓦罗先生，我还想帮你检查下其它模组…请转过去一点。
t_en: Mr. Svarog, I still want to help you check a few other modules... Turn around a little.

t_ch: 没反应呢……
t_en: It's not responding...

t_ch: 怎么回事，这下层区的电梯就没一部好用的嘛！
t_en: Why? Why is every elevator in the Underworld busted!?

t_ch: 桑博…我们到了没啊？
t_en: Sampo... Are we there yet?

t_ch: 老妹，你不至于隔一分钟问一次吧？再两步，再往前走两步就到了。
t_en: Do you have to ask every other minute, missy? Two more steps, just two more steps and you're there.

t_ch: 喂，你去哪！眼下还有更重要的事吧，别到处神游啦！
t_en: Hey, where are you going? We have more important things to do. Stop dilly-dallying!

t_ch: 娜塔莎的医用物资
t_en: Natasha's Medical Supplies

t_ch: 一见倾心，一锤定音！由「地火」组织的旧物拍卖会即将开幕！有意向的朋友，欢迎届时前往流浪者营地参加拍卖会！
t_en: Love at first sight, sold at first strike! The Wildfire used item auction is opening soon! If you're interested, head down to the vagrant camp and get involved!

t_ch: 外来者！我记得你，莫非你也想在拍卖会上淘些宝贝？
t_en: Outsider! I remember you. Perhaps you're hoping to find some treasures at the auction, too?

t_ch: 能捞着什么宝贝？
t_en: What kind of treasures can I find there?

t_ch: 其实完全没兴趣…
t_en: No, not interested...

t_ch: 别急着走嘛！让我给你讲讲，讲完了你就感兴趣了。
t_en: Don't just dash off! Let me tell you about it. I'm sure I can stoke your interest...

t_ch: 我们这拍卖会没那么多规矩，上到贝洛伯格的珍奇异宝，下到路边捡的破袜子，应有尽有——总有一款适合你！
t_en: We're not sticklers at this auction — you'll find everything from exotic Belobog rarities to tattered roadside socks!

t_ch: 「地火」为什么要举办拍卖会？
t_en: Why is Wildfire hosting an auction?

t_ch: 「地火」介入流浪者营地的管理之后，发现那边存在很大的物资分配问题。人们宁愿屯着一大堆没用的玩意，也不愿意拿出来互换有用的生存物资。
t_en: Oh after Wildfire got involved in the maintenance of the vagrant camp, they saw there was a big resource distribution problem. People would rather keep a stockpile of useless objects than exchange them for useful resources.

t_ch: 所以我们想了个法子，干脆组织一场民间拍卖会，让大家物尽其用，各取所需！
t_en: So we intend to hold a public auction. It will allow folks to make the best use of the stuff they have by exchanging it for stuff they need.

t_ch: 这拍卖会都是什么人参加？
t_en: Who's going to the auction?

t_ch: 主要还是营地里的流浪者——当然了，磐岩镇的居民也可以自由参加！
t_en: It's mostly vagrants from the camp, but Boulder Town residents are welcome to join as well, of course!

t_ch: 来的人越多，可供交易的商品就越丰富，拍卖会的目的也就能达到了！
t_en: The more attendees we have, the more items there will be for trade, and the better we can meet the auction's goal!

t_ch: 拍卖会如何进行？
t_en: How will the auction be held?

t_ch: 无论是买家还是卖家，都需要到拍卖会上注册身份信息。卖家的每件商品信息也需要通过注册，确保质量过关。
t_en: Buyers and sellers must all register their personal information. To ensure the quality of items, the sellers must also register details for each item.

t_ch: 然后就是正常的拍卖流程。拍卖师展示拍品，买家现场竞价…怎么样，简单吧？
t_en: Then there's the standard auction procedure. The auctioneer presents the items, and the bidders place their bids on the spot... Pretty straightforward, don't you think?

t_ch: 拍卖会上有什么好东西？
t_en: What kind of treasures can I find at the auction?

t_ch: 那可多了——比如奥列格首领用过的拳套，还有菲多拉小姐制造的家居机器人……
t_en: Oh plenty! Gloves used by Chief Oleg, the domestic robot that Miss Fidora built...

t_ch: 流浪者营地里有不少翻找古代遗物的淘金者，所以我们这次的拍卖会也会有不少稀世宝物，举个例子吧，听说有一件拍品是九成新的「地髓矿脉探针」……
t_en: There are lots of prospectors hunting for ancient relics in the vagrant camp, so there should be a lot of unique items at this auction. For example, I heard that one of the goods up for auction is a barely used Geomarrow Probe...

t_ch: 「地髓矿脉探针」？
t_en: Geomarrow Probe?

t_ch: 怎么，你听说过这样宝贝？怎么样，现在对拍卖会更感兴趣了吧？
t_en: Ah, never heard of a treasure like that before, huh? More excited about the auction now?

t_ch: 嘿，这样吧——你拿上这页宣传单，上面有更多有关珍奇拍品的信息。记得到时候来流浪者营地参加拍卖会，不见不散！
t_en: Oh, here — take this pamphlet. It has more information on all the rarities up for auction. Remember to stop by the vagrant camp! Be there or be square!

t_ch: 把地髓探针的消息告诉虎克吧…她说不定想帮费斯曼把宝贝淘回来。
t_en: I should tell Hook about the Geomarrow Probe... She might want to help Fersman get his treasure back.

t_ch: 宣传单你拿着。好好看看，可别丢了。记得到时候来流浪者营地参加拍卖会，不见不散！
t_en: Take a pamphlet, have a look, and don't lose it! Remember to stop by the vagrant camp for the auction. Be there or be square!

t_ch: 啊，鼹鼠党的荣誉队员！虎克正打算去找你呢！
t_en: Ah, honorary member! I was just about to go see you!

t_ch: 你先说吧，漆黑的虎克大人？
t_en: What's up, Pitch-Dark Hook the Great?

t_ch: 老爹已经订好生日宴会了，但虎克的「菌菌」还没有卖出去…而且，送给老爹的礼物也没有准备好。
t_en: Daddy's already planned his birthday party, but I haven't been able to sell Junjun... or buy a gift for him.

t_ch: 虎克该怎么办！荣誉队员，你快想想办法！
t_en: What should I do? Honorary member — you think of something!

t_ch: 去把老爹的探针找回来吧。
t_en: We should go get your dad's probe back.

t_ch: 啊！虎克正想问你和探针有关的事呢！
t_en: Ah! I was just about to ask you about the probe!

t_ch: 还是让我先说吧。
t_en: I have to tell you something first.

t_ch: 嗯？这么着急？那你先说吧！
t_en: Huh? What's so urgent? Spit it out!

t_ch: 我知道费斯曼的探针的下落了…
t_en: I know where Fersman's probe is...

t_ch: 啊！你怎么知道虎克在想什么？虎克正打算问你有关探针的事呢！
t_en: Ah! How did you know what I was thinking? Hook was about to ask you about the probe!

t_ch: 这么说来，你是找到什么线索了吗，荣誉队员？
t_en: Honorary member, you found some clues?

t_ch: 拍卖会…竟、竟然还有这种好事？！
t_en: The auction... So... that's where the probe is!?

t_ch: 你懂「拍卖」是什么意思吗？
t_en: Do you know what "auction" means?

t_ch: 你这家伙，把虎克当笨蛋嘛！
t_en: Hmph! Do you think Hook's stupid or something?

t_ch: 如果是拍卖的话，虎克不仅能找机会把「菌菌」卖出去，还能给老爹买下生日礼物…太好啦！
t_en: At the auction, I can sell Junjun AND buy a birthday gift for daddy... Yeah!

t_ch: 可惜拍卖不是一口价…
t_en: The bad news is you'll have to compete with other bidders...

t_ch: 怕什么，不是还有你在嘛！只要你能帮虎克拍下来就行，全靠你啦，荣誉队员！
t_en: That's nothing — you're here too! I've got the honorary member here to help me with the bidding!

t_ch: 「菌菌」还在老巫婆那里，我们拿上它，然后赶紧报名参加拍卖会吧！
t_en: Junjun is still with the old witch. Let's go get him and then register for the auction!

t_ch: 老巫…娜塔莎姐姐！「菌菌」已经缝补好了吗？
t_en: Stupid, witchy old... Natasha! Hehe, h—have you finished fixing Junjun?

t_ch: 啊，是虎克的熊玩偶吗？基本缝补好了，你拿去看看吧。
t_en: Oh, your teddy bear? Hehe... He's nearly done. Here, take a look at him.

t_ch: 哇…简直和新的一样！娜塔莎姐姐太厉害了。
t_en: Wow... He looks brand-new! Natasha, you're incredible.

t_ch: 你喜欢就好。不过…你带着{NICKNAME}跑过来，真的只是为了取玩偶吗？快说吧，你们又有什么打算？
t_en: Glad to be of service. Now then... did you really bring {NICKNAME} over here with you just to pick up Junjun? Come on now, what are you guys up to this time?

t_ch: 我们要去参加拍卖…
t_en: We're going to the auct...

t_ch: 啊，不对！我们才没有什么打算！
t_en: Ah... n—no! That's not what we're going to do!

t_ch: 我们要去参加拍卖会。
t_en: We're going to the auction...

t_ch: 喂！你这个大嘴巴。
t_en: Hey! You bigmouth!

t_ch: …拍卖会，流浪者营地的那个吗？
t_en: ...The auction, the one at the vagrant camp?

t_ch: 我们要去找尤利安躲猫猫。
t_en: We're going to look for Julian and play hide-and seek-with him.

t_ch: 没、没错！
t_en: Uh... yeah, that's right!

t_ch: 虎克想说的是拍卖会吧？原来如此，流浪者营地的那个吗？
t_en: The auction... right Hook? The one at the vagrant camp?

t_ch: 我们没有什么打算！
t_en: We're not up to anything!

t_ch: 和虎克一起待久了，你也变得幼稚了呢。
t_en: ...You've been spending too much time with Hook.

t_ch: 虎克想说的是拍卖会吧？原来如此，流浪者营地的那个吗？
t_en: The auction... right Hook? The one at the vagrant camp?

t_ch: 你让我费这么大力气缝补好「菌菌」，原来就是为了能把它卖出去啊——虎克？
t_en: So you made me go through all this effort to repair Junjun just so you could sell him...?

t_ch: 那个…这个…喂，荣誉队员！快来帮虎克狡辩一下！
t_en: I... uh... Psst, honorary member! Think of something!

t_ch: 看好了，我要开始狡辩了。
t_en: Commencing plan "think of something."

t_ch: 放弃挣扎吧…
t_en: I think we should give up...

t_ch: 你们两个的组合还真可爱。
t_en: Hehe, you two make an adorable duo.

t_ch: 我只是在开玩笑，虎克。「菌菌」是你的玩具，想拿它怎么办都由你自己决定。但你得答应我一件事——
t_en: I was only joking, Hook. Junjun is yours, and it's entirely up to you what you do with him. But you must make one promise to me...

t_ch: 什、什么事？
t_en: Wh—What is it?

t_ch: 别再闯到裂界里去了。费斯曼先生听说了上次的事，专门来找我刨根问底了一番。
t_en: Don't go charging into the Fragmentum again. Mr. Fersman heard about what you did and came to me to find out what happened.

t_ch: 你老爹很担心你，别再做让他不放心的事了。
t_en: Your dad worries about you — stop giving him reasons to.

t_ch: 老爹…好！虎克保证，绝不让娜塔莎姐姐和老爹再担心了。
t_en: Daddy... Aw... Okay, I swear I'll never make Natasha or daddy worry again.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，又要麻烦你盯好这孩子了。不过我看你还挺乐在其中的，就不说多余的话了。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, I'm going to have to trouble you to keep an eye on this kid again. You seem to be doing a good job, so I'll leave it at that.

t_ch: 去忙你们的吧，祝你们一切顺利。
t_en: Off you go then, and good luck.

t_ch: 谢谢娜塔莎姐姐！走吧，荣誉队员——去拍卖会咯！
t_en: Thanks, Natasha! Honorary member, let's head to the auction!

t_ch: 去忙你们的吧，祝你们一切顺利。
t_en: Off you go then, and good luck.

t_ch: 你好，你们是来参加拍卖会的吗？
t_en: Welcome! Are you here to take part in the auction?

t_ch: 没错，虎克想拍卖大熊玩偶！
t_en: Yep! Hook wants to auction this teddy bear!

t_ch: 玩偶？小朋友，先拿来给我看看吧……
t_en: Teddy bear? How about I take a look at it first, little missy...

t_ch: 嗯…恕我直言，这件商品可能会流拍啊…毕竟在下实在看不出它有什么价值。
t_en: Hm... With all due respect, I don't think this item will generate much interest at the auction... I don't see any value in it.

t_ch: 这玩偶其实还挺值钱的。
t_en: Actually, this bear is worth quite a lot of money.

t_ch: 嗯，我再看看…做工确实不错，布料也很柔软…但光凭这些应该也卖不出多少钱吧？
t_en: Hm, let me take another look... The craftsmanship is excellent, and the fabric is soft... but I'm afraid that won't command a high price on its own.

t_ch: 你仔细看看它的眼睛…
t_en: Take a closer look at the eyes...

t_ch: 就你这水平还当拍卖师呢？
t_en: Call yourself an auctioneer?

t_ch: 等等，这玩偶的眼睛…是天然黑宝石！天哪，这么丑陋的玩偶上怎么会有这么珍贵的宝石？
t_en: The eyes... wait a minute, that's natural erebus! Haha, what are precious gems doing on such an ugly teddy?

t_ch: 喂，你说谁丑呢？快收回你的话！
t_en: Hey, who are you calling ugly? Take that back!
